_comment: Golden planning-accuracy cases. Catalog = the four UtilityBackend caps (time, random_int, reverse, string_length). Add cases freely — the harness reads this file at runtime; no recompile needed for new cases. `expect_tools` is the exact multiset of capability names the compiled plan should call ([] = answer directly, no tools). `category`: single | multi | chain | none | trap.

cases.name: reverse
cases.query: Reverse the word "hello".

cases.name: random_int
cases.query: Give me a random integer between 1 and 10.

cases.name: time
cases.query: What is the current server time right now?

cases.name: string_length
cases.query: How many characters are in the text "hello world"?

cases.name: reverse_quoted
cases.query: Take the string "OpenWolf" and give it back reversed.

cases.name: count_chars_sentence
cases.query: Count the number of characters in: The quick brown fox.

cases.name: reverse_and_random
cases.query: Reverse the word "neuron" and also give me a random integer between 1 and 100.

cases.name: time_and_random
cases.query: Tell me the current server time and pick a random number from 1 to 6.

cases.name: reverse_and_length
cases.query: Reverse "abcdef", and separately count the characters in "hello".

cases.name: reverse_then_count
cases.query: Reverse the word "planner", then tell me how many characters the reversed word has.

cases.name: time_then_reverse
cases.query: Show the current server time, then give that timestamp back reversed as a string.

cases.name: random_then_length
cases.query: Pick a random integer between 1 and 1000, then count how many characters that number has written out.

cases.name: current_time_reversed
cases.query: show current time as reverted string

cases.name: current_time
cases.query: what is the current time?

cases.name: greeting
cases.query: Hi there, how are you doing today?

cases.name: definition
cases.query: In one sentence, what is a neural network?

cases.name: translation
cases.query: Translate "bonjour le monde" into English.

cases.name: arithmetic
cases.query: What is 17 plus 25?

cases.name: summarize_provided
cases.query: Summarize this in one line: N3UR0N is a peer-to-peer gateway for invoking AI capabilities with signed messages.

cases.name: code_explain
cases.query: What does the Rust expression `vec.iter().map(|x| x + 1).collect::<Vec<_>>()` do?

cases.name: trap_shuffle
cases.query: Shuffle this list of names into a random order: Alice, Bob, Carol.

cases.name: trap_future_date
cases.query: What day of the week is 25 December 2030?
